name: @aaes-os/governed-runtime
description: Universal coding adapter layer — CodingRouter, backends, and policy-driven routing

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && node --input-type=module -e "import { cpSync, mkdirSync } from 'node:fs'; mkdirSync('dist/policies',{recursive:true}); cpSync('src/policies/coding.yaml','dist/policies/coding.yaml'); cpSync('src/policies/coding-free.yaml','dist/policies/coding-free.yaml');"
